article.title: How to Get Website Traffic Without Ads - 7 Free Strategies That Work
article.body_markdown:
Paid ads stop the moment you stop paying. Organic traffic compounds year after year. Here are 7 free ways to drive traffic.

1. SEO blog content - one keyword, one article, permanent traffic
2. Free directories - Product Hunt, SaaSHub, BetaList
3. Social media consistency - X, LinkedIn, Reddit
4. Cross-post to Dev.to and Medium
5. Answer questions on Quora and Reddit
6. Free tools attract natural backlinks
7. Email newsletter from your blog content

The best part: strategies 1-7 all feed each other. One article becomes 5 social posts, 1 newsletter, and 3 cross-posts.

I built [SEO Spark](https://seospark.net) to make strategy 1 take 60 seconds. Free tier: 3 articles.
